title: hymenopappus obtusifolius
intro: Hymenopappus obtusifolius, also known as flaxen or narrowleaf fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hymenopappus obtusifolius include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Hymenopappus obtusifolius can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
